The '''HuntSuit''' was a [[Power armor/Legends|powersuit]] that provided protection and was specialized for those in the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] profession. Bounty hunters of all types found the HuntSuit to work well for their purposes. The popular piece of protection was developed by [[Corellian Technologies/Legends|Corellian Technologies]]. It was often modified with a [[Power cell/Legends|power cell]] recharger, short-range [[Motion sensor/Legends|motion sensors]], and storage systems for extra equipment and munitions.<ref name="gundark">''[[Gundark's Fantastic Technology: Personal Gear]]''</ref> The suit typically cost 2,900 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].
